description: Users need a notification center to manage their notifications and read states.

userStories.title: Add notification persistence schema
userStories.description: As a system, I want to store notification read state so it persists across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create database schema for notifications and read state

userStories.title: Add notification list UI and unread badges
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see unread badges and open a notification list.
acceptanceCriteria: Badge shows count of unread notifications
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add read/unread state updates
userStories.description: As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend action to update read state
UI toggle to mark read or unread
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add read state filter
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter the notification list by read state.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add clear read notifications feature
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear all read notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend action to clear read notifications
UI button to clear read notifications
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
